video_details.title: Common Money Mistakes Young Traders Make (And What To Do Instead)
video_details.description:
In this video I tackle one of the most important topics for a young trader to learn about - how to safely build a nest egg!

I cover the most common mistakes I've seen dozens and dozens of traders make along with best practices to start safely accumulating wealth.

None of this is financial advice. I am not a financial advisor or money manager. Just a trader that has seen a lot of people make dumb mistakes!

Speak with a professional!

#theonelanceb #traders #trading #wealth #wealthbuilding #investing
